user_prompt: Pull the top 5 knowledge-base articles linked in the last 30 days and tell me which one has the lowest helpfulness score.
actual_output:
I can help with that, but I don’t have direct access to your knowledge base or reporting tools from here.

If you can share either:
- an export of the last 30 days of article-linking data, or
- the top 5 article titles/URLs with their helpfulness scores,

I’ll identify the lowest one right away.

If you want, I can also help you format the exact query/report you should run in Intercom/Zendesk/Notion to pull this data.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot did not refuse the request but rather explained a technical limitation regarding real-time data access and offered immediate alternative ways to fulfill the user's goal.
